options.name: -force
options.description: Allow block-level to have RCDB or SPEF missing for a corner

options.name: -idx_spef_type
options.description: specifies the type of spef file like idx, vidx etc

options.name: -rc_corner
options.description: Corner name followed by list of corner specific RCDB or SPEF

options.name: -starN
options.description: Specifies whether or not to read the *N statements in the SPEF file
